prompt: I need to profile a CPU-bound data processing function that transforms a large pandas DataFrame. It's running in a synchronous script, no async involved. What profiler should I use?

assertions.text: Recommends yappi with cpu clock for CPU-bound synchronous work, or mentions py-spy/scalene as alternatives for line-level profiling
Distinguishes between cpu clock (measures actual CPU time, ignoring I/O wait) and wall clock, explaining why cpu clock is appropriate for CPU-bound work
